title: begonia × intermedia
intro: Begonia × intermedia, also known as angel wing begonia, is a popular ornamental plant species that belongs to the family Begoniaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infections. The health benefits of Begonia × intermedia include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
